---
title: "Group Members"
format: html
---

* Principal Investigators (PIs)
* Postdoctoral Researchers
* PhD Students
* Master’s Students
* Alumni



Post-doc : Katka et TL + Guillaume Lafitte (Chloé)
Doctorants :

Mariana
Simon
Julien
Qian Wu (soutenance en 2025)
Giulia Merlini (soutenance en 2025)
Stagaires (en cours)
Margaux Mercier
Odette
Parsa
Madouba Sangare (2025)
Siyue Peng (2025)
